tasks.title: Fix duplicate row on classification retry
tasks.description: When classification fails in the upload flow, a partial row is saved with OCR data and 'Pending' status (page.tsx ~line 179). When the user clicks retry and classification succeeds, a second full row is created (~line 200) instead of updating the existing partial row. Fix by storing the partial row's ID and updating it on retry instead of creating a new row.
tasks.test_strategy: Manual: trigger a classification failure, verify partial row appears. Click retry, verify the same row is updated (not duplicated).
acceptance_criteria: When classification fails, exactly one row is created with partial OCR data
When retry succeeds, that same row is updated with full classification data
No duplicate rows are created during the retry flow
Row status changes from 'Pending' to 'Processed' on successful retry

tasks.title: Narrow MutationObserver scope in ReceiptImagePreview
tasks.description: The MutationObserver in ReceiptImagePreview.tsx watches the entire .h-screen dashboard container with subtree: true, firing on every DOM mutation including keystrokes in search. Narrow the observer to watch only the table's tbody element.
tasks.test_strategy: Manual: open dashboard, verify thumbnails still render. Type in search, verify no excessive flicker or re-rendering.
acceptance_criteria: MutationObserver targets the table tbody element, not the entire dashboard container
Thumbnails still render correctly when data table rows change
No unnecessary transformCells calls during non-table DOM mutations

tasks.title: Add multi-receipt batch upload with queue UI
tasks.description: Allow uploading multiple receipt files at once. Extend ReceiptUploader.tsx to accept multiple files via drag-and-drop and file picker. Process them sequentially with a queue UI showing individual progress per file. Each file goes through the existing upload -> OCR -> classify -> save pipeline independently. Failed files do not block others. Redirect to dashboard when all are processed.
tasks.test_strategy: Manual: select 3+ files at once. Verify each shows individual progress. Fail one intentionally. Verify others still process. Check dashboard for all successful receipts.
acceptance_criteria: File input and drop zone accept multiple files
Each file shows individual progress (uploading, OCR, classifying, done/error)
Failed uploads show error per-file without blocking others
All successful receipts appear in dashboard after processing
Overall progress shows X of Y completed

tasks.title: Add PWA manifest and mobile camera capture
tasks.description: Add web app manifest and service worker for installability. Add camera capture to upload page via capture='environment' on mobile. Ensure upload page is responsive at 375px width. Add appropriate meta tags.
tasks.test_strategy: Manual: open on 375px viewport. Verify camera capture on mobile. Run Lighthouse PWA audit.
acceptance_criteria: manifest.json with correct name, icons, start_url, display: standalone
Service worker registered for basic caching
Mobile file input offers camera capture option
Upload page usable at 375px width
Lighthouse PWA audit passes installability

tasks.title: Evaluate multimodal LLM as single-call OCR replacement
tasks.description: Create a spike comparing the current two-step pipeline (Google Vision OCR -> OpenRouter classification) with a single multimodal LLM call. Use OpenRouter to send the receipt image to a multimodal model with a structured JSON output schema. Add as an alternative code path behind USE_MULTIMODAL_OCR env var. Do NOT replace the existing pipeline.
tasks.test_strategy: Create comparison script processing sample receipts through both pipelines. Log accuracy, latency, token usage.
acceptance_criteria: New multimodal-ocr.ts module accepting image and returning ExtractionResult
OCR route supports USE_MULTIMODAL_OCR env var to switch pipelines
Existing pipeline unchanged and remains default
Comparison results documented
